title: Luffy Enters Queen’s Deadly Prison Game
description: On pages 14–17, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Law, Unknown person #15, Unknown person #16 as The Flower Capital erupts around Orochi and Komurasaki while Luffy is forced into Queen’s brutal prison games.
scene: Queen turns Udon into a spectacle while Luffy and Hyogoro are forced to survive a deadly punishment game.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Hey!! Where is 0-soba MA...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: SK...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You should've said something earlier about not being able to handle a woman's body!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I'm not weak against-...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now's our chance! Let's get out of here!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Drake... you're from the north blue, right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: So are you. What about it?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: That's German 66's...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Stealth Black!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: The real deal!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Chase him!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: They escaped through the sky!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: It'S A LONG STORY!!! I'll explain later!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're losing a lot of blood... are you okay?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I DON'T CARE IF I DIE ANYMORE!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...It's really bad that they know about the ankle tattoo!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...and that's not even the worst part. I found out something else...

dialogue.speaker: Law
dialogue.text: Bepo and the others were captured....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: What!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They're gonna use them to lure out TRA-Guy....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: We have to get to him first....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: other- wise, the flower capital is going to fall into chaos!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If that's the case, what the hell have you been doing this whole time!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: HOFF... HOFF...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: I found you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Are you done running away?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: For someone who chased right after me, it sure took you a while.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Shut up!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: I have already returned...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: the world- renowned blade, SHUSU, to its rightful place.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That blade belongs to the legendary samural of Wano, Ryuma!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: That keepsake was stolen from his grave!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: I know that!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...If that's the case, then go back to where you came from quietly!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you don't, I'll take the two swords on your waist, too.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are you a weapons collector? What are you planning to do with such a collection?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're just in time. We've been looking for a lot of weapons...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: What a great twist of fate...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Your weapon collect-tion...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: I'll be taking all of it!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You will die by the hand of the one you stole from, you thief!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Due on top of a bridge....!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Prison and Capital Crisis storyline with 42 dialogue beats. Orochi’s paranoia and Queen’s prison game raise the stakes on both sides of Wano.
